message:
bench: add DuckDB/Polars UDF and batch comparisons to pushdown benchmark

Now compares all 5 approaches:
1. LanceQL @logic_table (native pushdown)
2. DuckDB Python UDF (row-by-row, no pushdown)
3. DuckDB → Python batch (pull data, then NumPy)
4. Polars .apply() UDF (row-by-row, no pushdown)
5. Polars → Python batch (pull data, then NumPy)

Results on 100K rows with 50% selectivity:
- @logic_table: 0.06ms (baseline)
- DuckDB UDF: 69ms (1135x slower)
- DuckDB batch: 2.9ms (47x slower)
- Polars UDF: 42ms (696x slower)
- Polars batch: 2.8ms (47x slower)
